description_long: This is a compact, two-story urban convenience store with a weathered concrete exterior and a flat roof, partially covered by creeping ivy. The storefront features a green-and-white awning with Japanese text, illuminated signage, and vending machines, giving it a distinctly local character. A black car is parked to the side, adjacent to a narrow driveway and a sidewalk, while cardboard boxes are stacked near the entrance. The upper floor has large, frosted windows, and a metal ladder runs up the side of the building, suggesting rooftop access. The ground level is paved with dark bricks, and the overall structure appears aged, with visible stains and wear. The building is situated directly on the street, blending seamlessly into an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A weathered, two-story urban convenience store with a green-and-white awning, illuminated signage, vending machines, and a parked car, featuring concrete walls and creeping ivy.
description_view_0: The left side of the building shows a plain, stained concrete wall with some ivy on the roof and a partial view of the awning and car.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the green-and-white awning with Japanese signage, vending machines, cardboard boxes, and the main entrance, with the car and sidewalk visible.
description_view_2: The right side displays the car parked next to the building, a vending machine, a metal ladder, and extensive ivy climbing the wall.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a blank, weathered concrete wall with some ivy, the back of the car, and the edge of the sidewalk.
attribute_storefront_signage: Prominent green-and-white awning with Japanese text, illuminated from within, mounted above the entrance; small red and white signs on vending machines and near the door.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: None; entrance appears to be a solid door under the awning.
attribute_display_windows: Large frosted windows on the upper floor, no clear display windows at street level.
